data.title: Bitcoin Forming Technical Setup That Previously Resulted in Bullish Reversals, According to Analyst
data.description:
Widely followed crypto analyst Rekt Capital says that Bitcoin (BTC) is displaying textbook pre-rally behavior as technical indicators and price action flash green. The pseudonymous analyst tells his 543,000 followers on the social media platform X that BTC is showing bullish divergence with the relative strength index (RSI).
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/13/bitcoin-forming-technical-setup-that-previously-resulted-in-bullish-reversals-according-to-analyst/

data.title: Opinion: Chaos in the U.S. bond market may force the Fed to intervene, which may prompt some investors to turn to Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon is preparing for chaos in the nearly $30 trillion U.S. Treasury market, and the Federal Reserve will only act if "they start to panic a little bit." The U.S. Treasury market plays a central role in global finance, setting the tone for all market factors from mortgage rates to corporate bond yields. Jamie Dimon warned that if the financial system is paralyzed again, the consequences could spread to the entire economy.
The turmoil in the U.S. Treasury market has led to the intervention of the Federal Reserve, which may prompt some investors to turn to Bitcoin (BTC), which is often seen as a hedge against currency instability. This seemed to be the case in 2020, when the Federal Reserve took aggressive stimulus measures and Bitcoin prices soared. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bitcoin price tags $86K as Trump tariff relief boosts breakout odds
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) hit an eleven-day high on April 13 as the crypto market relief rally closely tracked US financial policy changes. BTC/USD 1-hour chart. The pair had reacted well to news that US President Donald Trump had decided to exclude certain key products from his ongoing trade tariffs against China
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-tags-86-k-as-trump-tariff-relief-boosts-breakout-odds?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Scotland's Lomond School announces acceptance of Bitcoin payments and considers establishing Bitcoin asset reserves, becoming the first in the UK
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Lomond School, a private boarding school in Scotland, announced its decision to accept Bitcoin payments, which means that the school will become the first school in the UK to start accepting Bitcoin payments. It is reported that Lomond School will accept Bitcoin in stages and will convert the received digital currency into pounds. The school also stated that it will ensure full compliance with British financial regulations when accepting Bitcoin, and will consider establishing Bitcoin reserves if the use of Bitcoin in the UK expands. (The Times)

data.title: Best Meme Coins to Buy as Fartcoin’s 300% Run Early Sign for Returning Risk-on Sentiment in Crypto
data.description:
In times when the global economy is reeling from the brunt of the ongoing Trump-inflicted trade war, there’s one asset that has outperformed everything. It’s Fartcoin ($FARTCOIN), an AI agent-based meme coin launched in October last year. $FARTCOIN has surged by more than 350% since March 10 and over 90% since just the last week. What’s more, its market capitalization now stands at a whopping $877M
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/best-meme-coins-to-buy-as-fartcoins-300-run-early-sign-for-returning-risk-on-sentiment-in-crypto/

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has liquidated 21.4528 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of 21.4528 million US dollars, of which long positions had a liquidation of 20.5521 million US dollars and short positions had a liquidation of 900,700 US dollars.
